childhood.familyBackground: Built manufacturing empire starting from textiles. Family business expanded into industrial equipment production.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 섬유에서 시작한 제조 제국 건설. 가족 사업이 산업 장비 생산으로 확장
childhood.education: Indian Institute of Technology, engineering degree
childhood.earlyLife: Born in business family in Gujarat. Trained in manufacturing and management. Passionate about industrial innovation.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 구자라트의 사업 가족에서 출생. 제조 및 관리 훈련. 산업 혁신에 열정적

careerTimeline.event: Expanded to international markets across Asia
Invested in automation and smart manufacturing

failures.description: Global recession impacted industrial equipment demand
failures.descriptionKo: 글로벌 경기 침체가 산업 장비 수요에 영향

quotes.text: Indian manufacturing has untapped potential for global competitiveness
quotes.textKo: 인도 제조는 글로벌 경쟁력을 위한 미개발 잠재력이 있다

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Transforming traditional Indian manufacturing into modern industrial powerhouse
personalTraits.knownForKo: 전통적 인도 제조를 현대 산업 강자로 변환
personalTraits.philanthropy: Invests in vocational training and worker education
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 직업 훈련 및 근로자 교육에 투자
